basic_details.job_title: IBITF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer and Chief Technology Officer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: IIT Bhilai Innovation and Technology Foundation (IBITF)
basic_details.post_name: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Chief Technology Officer (CTO)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Bhilai Innovation and Technology Foundation (IBITF) Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IBITF Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: CEO: Max 55 years, CTO: Max 45 years
age_limit.details: Chief Executive Officer (CEO): Maximum age limit is 55 years. Chief Technology Officer (CTO): Maximum age limit is 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA for CEO, B.Tech/B.E. in CS/Engg. or related for CTO. Minimum 10 years experience for CEO, 5 years for CTO.
qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) MBA from a reputed institution in India or abroad. Minimum 10 years of leadership experience, preferably in technology-driven, innovation-focused, or research-intensive settings. Chief Technology Officer (CTO) B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science / Engineering or related discipline Postgraduate / Master's in Entrepreneurship, Public Policy, Management, or related field Minimum 5 years of relevant experience, with demonstrated work in: Technology-enabled projects, digital platforms, or innovation initiatives; Entrepreneurship development, startup ecosystems, incubation programs, or enterprise-building initiatives; Program implementation, monitoring, or project management; Engagement with government systems, public institutions, or development sector initiatives

salary_details.pay_scale: CEO: Up to 45 lakhs per annum, CTO: Up to 24 lakhs per annum

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IBITF Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IBITF to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IBITF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IBITF Recruitment 2026 is 22nd May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for CEO and CTO posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by IBITF for the posts of Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Chief Technology Officer (CTO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the CEO post?
faq.answer: For the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) position, candidates must possess an MBA from a reputed institution in India or abroad.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum experience required for the CTO post?
faq.answer: The Chief Technology Officer (CTO) position requires a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in areas like technology projects, digital platforms, or entrepreneurship development.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the CEO and CTO positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the CEO post is 55 years, and for the CTO post, it is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the CEO and CTO roles?
faq.answer: The CEO can expect a salary of up to 45 lakhs per annum, while the CTO can receive up to 24 lakhs per annum.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for IBITF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment. Candidates should check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a written test (optional) followed by an interview or interaction with the selection committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
